steps.t: Barad Rill can be found far to the south-west of Linhir in Dor-en-Ernil. Herion has asked you to recover relics from Barad Rill as well as plant a ban…
Herion can be found in Linhir in eastern Dor-en-Ernil. You have recovered the relics and planted a banner atop the ruins of Barad Rill. You should now…
